name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.SetCharacterDampingHelper.SomersaultThresh
summary: Somersault AngularMomentum measure above which we start damping - try 34.0.  Falling over straight backwards gives 54 on hitting ground.
remarks:
Default value = 34.0f.
            Min value = 0.0f.
            Max value = 200.0f.
